title: Marathon Digital Holdings Increases 2024 Hash Rate Target to 50 Exahash
text: Marathon Digital Holdings raised its hash rate target from 35-37 exahash to a new goal of 50 exahash for 2024. This 50 EH/s target represents approximately 100% growth. The company believes it is possible to double the scale of operations in 2024 and achieve 50 exahash by year-end, according to CEO Fred Thiel. The company stated with its current liquidity position this growth target is fully funded and there is no need to raise additional capital. By deploying state of the art equipment and proprietary technology, Marathon believes it can improve fleet efficiency and approach 21 joules per terahash as it grows to 50 exahash. Marathon has 45 additional exahash of capacity available between current orders and options with $1.6 billion of liquidity.
